summary: Made two surgical seam edits: one to tie August's opening-night unrest back to the prior chapter's promise of papers by morning, and one to aim the chapter's closing paperwork more directly toward the sale-yard transformation that opens the next chapter.
edits: Linked August's basin visit to the unused papers waiting on his desk for the morning, reinforcing carryover from Chapter 14.
Adjusted the final sentence so the posted notice points more directly toward the Vale household becoming sale merchandise in Chapter 16.
